LinkedLists are the foundation

There are two data structures, one could argue that they are algorithms more than data structures, that are implemented on top of linked lists. Lets go over each.















Queue

This is probably the most common data structure that i have implemented in many languages.

!to the white board!















Lets implement!

To the Typed JavaScripts

  • peek
